description: The captured agreement that results from awarding a supplier in sourcing (SCOR S1.10, OE6). It locks the awarded supplier and quotation as the source of truth for the purchase order: the agreed terms (payment, delivery, incoterm, scope), the validity window, the agreed price list, and a renewal date that drives a 15-day-before renewal reminder. A repeat/indirect award may instead create or extend a FrameworkAgreement; a one-off award produces a single contract.

fields.name: contractId
fields.label: Contract No.
fields.purpose: Stable key for the awarded agreement so the PO, the renewal reminder, and audit entries all reference one contract; the source-of-truth handle the ordering domain reads from.

fields.name: supplierId
fields.label: Supplier
fields.validation: the awarded supplier; must be ONBOARDED (not SUSPENDED/OFFBOARDED) at award
fields.purpose: Identifies the awarded supplier the contract binds; the supplier the PO is issued to and the party the agreed prices and terms apply to.

fields.name: requisitionId
fields.label: Requisition
fields.mandatoryCondition: set for a requisition-driven award (null for a standalone master agreement)
fields.purpose: Traces the contract back to the demand it was sourced for so the requisition identifier travels into ordering; null when the contract is a standalone master not tied to one requisition.

fields.name: awardedQuotationId
fields.label: Awarded Quotation
fields.mandatoryCondition: set for a competitive award (null when the contract is negotiated directly without an RFQ)
fields.validation: the selected quotation; must be the quote chosen at selection (with justification if non-top-ranked)
fields.purpose: Pins the exact quote that won (with its prices, terms, and incoterm) as the contract's commercial basis so the PO prices match the awarded quote line-for-line.

fields.name: terms
fields.label: Agreed Terms
fields.validation: captures agreed payment terms, delivery terms, incoterm, and scope; seeded from the awarded quotation, editable at award
fields.purpose: The negotiated terms of record (payment/delivery/incoterm/scope) that govern the PO and the eventual match and payment; the human-readable agreement an auditor reads.

fields.name: scopeOfWork
fields.label: Scope of Work
fields.validation: non-empty for service contracts; describes deliverables, sites, duration
fields.purpose: Defines what the supplier is contracted to deliver for service/contract POs where there is no item line; the basis for milestone acceptance in the two-way match path (axiom A8).

fields.name: agreedPrices
fields.label: Agreed Price List
fields.validation: list of {itemId or description, uom, agreedUnitPrice, currency}; seeded from the awarded quotation lines
fields.purpose: The locked unit prices the PO line agreedPrice draws from so ordering cannot drift from the awarded price; the price reference the 3-way match reconciles against.

fields.name: validityStart
fields.label: Validity Start
fields.validation: <= validityEnd; the date the agreed prices/terms take effect
fields.purpose: Opens the window in which the contract's prices and terms are valid for raising POs; POs outside the window are not covered by this contract.

fields.name: validityEnd
fields.label: Validity End
fields.validation: >= validityStart; after this date the contract is EXPIRED unless renewed
fields.purpose: Closes the validity window; expiry stops new POs drawing on this contract and triggers the EXPIRED status if not renewed in time.

fields.name: renewalDate
fields.label: Renewal Date
fields.validation: typically <= validityEnd; schedules a reminder 15 days before this date (AB rule)
fields.purpose: The date the contract should be reviewed/renewed; drives the 15-day-before renewal reminder so a contract is not allowed to lapse silently and leave POs uncovered.

fields.name: renewalReminderSentAt
fields.label: Renewal Reminder Sent At
fields.validation: now() when the 15-day-before reminder fires; null until then
fields.purpose: Records that the renewal reminder was dispatched so it fires once and the buyer/head have an audit trail of the renewal notice.

fields.name: status
fields.label: Status
fields.validation: DRAFT -> ACTIVE (on award approval) -> EXPIRED (past validityEnd) | RENEWED | TERMINATED
fields.purpose: Tracks whether the contract may currently back new POs; only an ACTIVE contract within validity is a legal source of truth for ordering.

invariants: A1 the requisition identifier the contract carries is immutable end to end
A6 award approval reuses the approval engine with SoD (award approver != selecting buyer)
A10 a SUSPENDED supplier cannot be awarded a new contract that backs new POs
A12 agreed prices and totals are normalized to base for analytics
A13 the award, renewal reminder, and status changes are audited and broadcast
the contract captures a renewal date with a 15-day-before reminder (sourcing rule)
